About

I am a Computer Technology graduate from Cebu Technological University — San Francisco Campus, with hands-on experience in web development, server administration, embedded systems, and IT support.

Graduated Cum Laude, Batch 2026 — a result of four years of hard work, dedication, and a deep passion for technology.

I built real projects throughout my studies: from configuring Linux servers with Drupal CMS and MariaDB, to creating IoT security systems with Arduino and RFID, to leading a capstone research study that improved library catalog accessibility. I also completed over a year of OJT at Ateneo de Cebu SHS where I grew not just technically, but personally — learning how to communicate professionally, work with people, and carry the Jesuit value of Magis (doing more and doing better).

🏫
On-the-Job Training
Sacred Heart School — Ateneo de Cebu
Senior High School Department · IT Support & Library Systems
📅 August 4, 2025 — Present  |  1+ Year
Networking PC Repair Laptop Troubleshooting Arduino Support Library Web System Student Assistance XAMPP VS Code Apache MySQL
During my OJT at Ateneo de Cebu SHS, I handled network setup and troubleshooting, repaired laptops and desktop PCs, and assisted students with their Arduino coding and technical problems. I also built the school's Library Attendance Monitoring System using XAMPP, VS Code, Apache, MySQL, and phpMyAdmin. Beyond the technical work, this experience taught me how to communicate clearly with students, teachers, and staff. The school's Christ-centered environment and the value of Magis deeply shaped how I approach work and life.

Capstone Research Team Name Tags
💡
Projects
SHS Library Attendance Monitoring System — Ateneo de Cebu
OJT · Web App
XAMPP Apache MySQL phpMyAdmin VS Code PHP HTML/CSS

I built this system during my OJT at Sacred Heart School — Ateneo de Cebu. Students and faculty can log in by searching or entering their name, then select their purpose of visit. The admin dashboard tracks total visits, manages student and staff records, prints reports, and logs every library entry. The system is running live at the school and has recorded over 572 visits from 698 students and 314 staff.

OPAC Enhancement via Web-Based Survey Feedback
Research · Web
Drupal 10 MySQL HTML/CSS Research

This is the capstone thesis project I led for the CTU San Francisco Learning Centre. We built a web-based survey using Drupal 10 Webforms to collect structured feedback from library users. The survey data was analyzed to identify gaps in the Online Public Access Catalog (OPAC) and produce practical recommendations to improve digital library accessibility.

📚
Enhancing Online Public Access Catalog Through Web-Based Survey Feedback and Analysis
Final Manuscript · BIT Computer Technology · CTU · May 2025 · Click to view PDF
Final Hardbound Manuscript
Thesis Defense with Panel
Library System Presentation
RFID & ESP8266 Smart Access Control System
IoT · Hardware
Arduino ESP8266 RFID RC522 C++

Built a wireless access control prototype that uses RFID card scanning to authenticate users. The ESP8266 Wi-Fi module sends access logs to a monitoring interface in real time. This project showed how embedded systems and networking can be combined to solve real security problems.

Ubuntu Linux Server & Drupal CMS Deployment
Linux · Server
Ubuntu Drupal 10 MariaDB Apache

Set up a full Linux server from bare OS install — including Apache web server, MariaDB configuration, Drupal CMS installation, and user permission management. We used a Dell OptiPlex 3020 Micro as the server hardware, deploying the system for the CTU library environment.

Dell OptiPlex 3020 — Server Hardware
